title: Lethal Environments
description: Adds specific environmental effects depending on the dimension
body:
Lethal Environments

Lethal Environments adds persistent status effects tied to the dimension and biome the player is in, simulating hostile environmental conditions and increasing immersion.

In the Nether, the mod sets the player on fire, forcing the use of Fire Resistance potions to survive and adding tension to exploration. In the End, the player is afflicted with the Wither effect, reflecting the toxic and oppressive atmosphere of the dimension.

The goal is to enhance RPG-style gameplay by adapting states and effects to the player’s surroundings, making each dimension feel more dangerous and unique. More effects will be added soon, including compatibility with biomes and dimensions from popular mods.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
